results.text: What is Roger Ebert's most famous review?<|>Did Oprah date Roger Ebert?<|>What kind of writing did Roger Ebert win a Pulitzer Prize for?<|>Who writes for Roger Ebert?

Roger Joseph Ebert was an American film critic, film historian, journalist, essayist, screenwriter, and author. He was a film critic for the Chicago Sun-Times from 1967 until his death in 2013. Ebert was known for his intimate, Midwestern writing voice and critical views informed by values of populism and humanism.
